title: UOB Profit Drops on Reduction in Bank’s Lending Income, Trading
description: United Overseas Bank Ltd. reported fourth-quarter profit that narrowly missed analyst expectations as income from lending as well as trading and investments declined.
content: United Overseas Bank Ltd. reported fourth-quarter profit that narrowly missed analyst expectations as income from lending as well as trading and investments declined.
